subject: how do I add my team

subject: sorry probably stupid question
body:
Hi,

Sorry — really basic question. I see 'tags' and 'labels' in the UI and I don't understand the difference. Are they the same thing? Or do they do different things?

Thanks for your patience with newbies :)

Priya

subject: did I pay or not
body: im on free trial right? but my card shows pending charge for $29. is that going to clear or not?

subject: Sorry I'm not sure what I'm doing wrong
body:
Hello,

Sorry for the bother. I followed the setup guide but I'm not seeing my emails come into the dashboard. I connected my Gmail (I think?) and clicked the green button that said something about authorization. But the inbox is empty.

Is there a step I missed? I'm sure it's something obvious.

Thanks,
Emily

subject: hello good afternoon dear support
body:
Hello good afternoon dear support team. I am very new user. I am from Mexico. My English is not perfect please excuse.

I tried to make account but when I press 'continue' nothing happens. The button just sit there. Browser is Chrome. No error showing.

Can you help to fix? I want to use product.

Thank you very much,
Carlos Vega

subject: Need help finding settings
body: Hi, I'm new and trying to figure things out. Where is the settings page? I see a gear icon on desktop but can't find one on the iPad. Can you point me in the right direction?

subject: doesn't work pls help
body: doesn't work pls help

subject: trial ending tomorrow!! Help!!
body:
Hi!! my trial ends tomorrow and I dont know if I should pay or if I get more days. I added my card during signup but I'm not sure if I was charged or not?? please help I don't want to lose access to all the stuff I set up

Lisa

subject: Question about feature
body:
Hi support,

Does your product have a thing where I can see who replied to a customer last? My boss asks me this every week and I have to dig through individual tickets.

If yes can you tell me where? If no, when will it be available?

David

subject: passwoed reset notnreceiving
body:
Sent from my phone

Hi i need to redet my passsord but the link nevwr comes. tried 3 timea. plesse help asap im locked out

Maria

subject: is this thing on?
body:
I sent an email to my support address yesterday from my personal account to test if it would show up here. Nothing showed up. Did I do something wrong? Where would it go?

Kevin

subject: what does 'unassigned' mean
body:
Hi,

Noob question — in the inbox view, some tickets say 'Unassigned' in red. Does that mean nobody is looking at them? If yes — am I supposed to assign them, or does the system do that?

Thanks for the help,
Nina

subject: Can someone help me — I'm not sure where to start
body:
Hi team,

I just inherited this account from a colleague who left. Honestly I'm a bit overwhelmed. The dashboard has a lot going on and I don't know which part to focus on first.

Is there a starter guide for someone in my situation? Or could someone hop on a quick call?

Tom

subject: free version??
body: do u have free version i can use without giving card details? just want to try first

subject: Two of my colleagues can sign in but not me
body:
Hi,

Weird one. Two people on my team signed in fine with their Google accounts. When I try the same flow, it just redirects me back to the sign-in page. No error. Just an infinite loop.

We're on the same workspace. Same domain (hotmail.com personal, but we use the same team workspace).

What should I check?

Chris

subject: Maybe a billing question? I'm not 100% sure
body:
Hello,

I received an email titled 'Your invoice is ready' but when I click the link I get to a page that just says 'Account not found.' My account very much exists — I'm logged in right now writing this message.

Is the email a phishing attempt or is your system confused about my account? Don't want to ignore it if real.

Olga

subject: help
body:
everything was working yesterday

now nothing

help

subject: Setup checklist — confused about step 3
body:
Hi,

On the onboarding checklist, step 3 says 'Connect your data source.' What counts as a data source? I have a Gmail account, a HubSpot CRM, and a Notion workspace. Are any/all of those data sources? Or is it something else entirely?

Jenny

subject: Fwd: Re: Re: Welcome
body:
I'm forwarding the email chain — I'm not sure which part has the problem. I clicked the link in the original welcome email and it took me to a page asking for a 'workspace ID' which I don't remember setting up.

Someone help please.

Mark

subject: asking for friend
body:
hi my friend recommended your tool. is the starter plan enough for a team of 4? he uses it for a team of 12 but ours is smaller

thanks
ravi

subject: Help me understand my dashboard
body:
Hello,

I'm looking at my dashboard and I see a lot of numbers but I don't really know what they mean. 'CSAT 87%' — is that good? 'Median first response: 4h 21m' — is that good or bad for my industry?

Is there a guide that explains what 'good' looks like for these numbers?

Lucy

subject: im stuck on the integration page
body:
im trying to connect my gmail but the popup window for google auth just closes immediately and nothing happens. tried 4 times. firefox latest. did not block popups on this site (allowed it). dunno what to do

paul

subject: Help — but I don't really know what to ask
body:
Hi support,

So here's the thing. I signed up two weeks ago. I imported my emails. I see them in the inbox. I assigned a few to myself. I replied to a couple.

But I'm not really sure if I'm 'using' the product the way it's supposed to be used? Like, am I missing some workflow that makes this faster than just regular Gmail?

Maybe a video call to walk through what 'good usage' looks like? Or is there a course?

Sorry this isn't really a support question.

Eva

subject: where the gear icon
body:
where the gear icon to change my profile pic. cant find anywhere. on mobile

ryan

subject: Confused about user vs member vs admin
body:
Hi,

I added someone to my workspace and the dropdown asked me to pick: User, Member, or Admin. The descriptions next to each were super short and basically said the same thing in different words.

What's the actual difference? I picked 'Member' but now I want to make sure that's right.

Thanks,
Sophia

subject: Tried to follow tutorial — got stuck step 4
body:
Hello!

I'm following the 'Getting Started' video tutorial on your YouTube. Step 4 says to click 'Create your first inbox' but I don't have that button. The tutorial is from 2024 — has the UI changed since then?

Daniel

subject: is the inbox empty because I'm new or because something broke
body:
Hi,

My inbox is empty. I don't know if that's because I just signed up and have no emails yet, or because something is broken and emails aren't coming in. How can I tell the difference?

Mia

subject: QUICK question
body:
is there a way to undo a send? i replied to a customer with a typo and want to fix it

alex

subject: Help with importing from Gmail
body:
Hi,

I'm trying to import my support emails from Gmail. I authorized the integration but the import has been 'pending' for like 6 hours. Is that normal? Should I cancel and retry?

First time using a tool like this so I have no idea what's normal.

Grace

subject: Where's the export button?
body:
I want to download a list of my customers but I can't find an export button anywhere. Help?

Noah

subject: Hello from a confused new user
body:
Hi team,

I'm trying really hard but I just can't figure out how to do something simple: when a customer emails me, how do I make sure my reply goes to them and not to someone else on my team?

Is the 'reply' button replying to me, the customer, or my team? It's not clear.

Sorry I know this is basic.

Ella
broken

subject: is the chatbot off?
body:
Hi,

When I added the chat widget to my site, the test chat works but when real customers chat, my AI bot doesn't respond. Is the AI bot turned off by default? I don't see an 'on' switch anywhere.

Hannah

subject: Where to put my API key
body:
Hola,

I got an API key from settings but I don't know where to use it. The docs page is showing curl commands but I don't know what curl is. I just want to make my Wordpress send tickets here.

Is there a Wordpress plugin or a simpler way?

Leo

subject: first day — accidentally deleted something
body:
Hi!

It's my first day with the tool and I accidentally archived a ticket I needed. Is there a way to un-archive? I don't see it anywhere in the views.

Zoe

subject: Need help — long question
body:
Dear team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing because over the last several days I have been attempting to configure my workspace in a manner that is consistent with the needs of my small business operations, which include managing customer communications across multiple platforms.

However, I have run into what I believe is a configuration issue but I am not entirely sure how to describe it. There are some settings that I believe should be available based on the documentation but which I cannot find.

Would someone be able to assist me in a more direct fashion?

With great thanks,
Ibrahim Ali

Ethan

lily

body:

I set up 2FA last week but I lost the phone I had the authenticator app on. Now I can't log in. I have backup codes somewhere but I literally don't remember where.

How do I get back in?

Oscar

On your pricing page it says 'starts at $19/user/month' but in my checkout it showed $24. Is there a tax or something I didn't see, or am I on the wrong plan?

Ruby

subject: Is this a scam email??
body:
Hi,

I just got an email from 'no-reply@helpscout-secure.com' saying my account needs verification. It looks like it might be from you but the domain isn't yours. Is this real or phishing?

Didn't click anything yet.

Jacob

subject: noob here — best practices?
body:

Want to do this right.

Emma
